info.description:
School Management System — Go + Gin + PostgreSQL

## Authentication
This API uses JWT Bearer tokens. Login via `POST /api/login` to receive an access token (1 hour) and a refresh token (7 days).
Click the **Authorize** button above and enter: `Bearer <your_token>`

## Roles
| Role    | Access                                              |
|---------|-----------------------------------------------------|
| Admin   | Full access to all endpoints                        |
| Teacher | Attendance, grades, locker (read public)             |
| Student | Own grades, report card, locker, finance             |
| Parent  | Children's data, report cards, finance               |
info.title: SMS Backend API

post.description: Records or updates attendance for a student in a subject on a given date. Teacher only.

get.description: Returns all attendance records for a class on a specific date. Teacher only.
get.summary: Get class attendance for a date

get.description: Returns overall and per-subject attendance stats for a student. Accessible by Teacher, Student (own), Admin, Parent (own child).

post.description: Saves grades for multiple students for a subject and term in one request. Teacher only.

get.description: Returns all grades for a student, optionally filtered by term and academic year. Accessible by Teacher, Student (own), Admin.
Returns all grades for a subject, optionally filtered by type and term. Teacher only.

parameters.description: Grade type: Midterm | Final | Quiz | Assignment
parameters.name: type

get.description: Returns a full report card with per-subject averages and letter grades. Accessible by Teacher, Student (own), Admin, Parent (own child).
Generates and downloads a PDF report card for a student. Accessible by Teacher, Student (own), Admin, Parent (own child).
Returns attendance percentage for every student across all classes. Admin only.
Returns all classes with teacher and student info. Admin only.

post.description: Creates a new class and optionally assigns a teacher. Admin only.
Enrolls a student into a subject. Prevents duplicate enrollments. Admin only.
Creates a payroll record for a teacher for a specific month and year. Admin only. Prevents duplicates.

400.description: Validation error or teacher not found

409.description: Payroll already exists for this month

patch.description: Sets a payroll record's status to Paid and records the payment timestamp. Admin only.
Admin marks a pending receipt as Verified or Rejected. Can only be done once per receipt.
patch.summary: Verify or reject a bank receipt

post.description: Looks up all absences for the given date (or today if omitted) and sends an email to each student's parent. Admin only.

parameters.description: Date to check absences for (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today.
parameters.name: date

post.description: Sends an email announcement to all active users, or to a specific set of roles. Admin only.

get.description: Returns all students with their user and class information. Admin only.

post.description: Creates a new student account with a linked user login. Admin only.

409.description: Email or student code already exists

get.description: Returns a single student record. Admin only.

put.description: Updates class, parent info, or date of birth for a student. Admin only.

delete.description: Deactivates the student's user account and soft-deletes the student record. Admin only.

get.description: Returns all subjects with their assigned teacher. Admin only.

post.description: Creates a new subject and optionally assigns a teacher. Admin only.

get.description: Returns all teachers with their user information. Admin only.

post.description: Creates a new teacher account with a linked user login. Admin only.

409.description: Email or teacher code already exists

post.description: Student or Parent submits proof of payment. Duplicate receipt IDs are rejected.

get.description: Admin sees all transactions. Students see only their own. Parents see transactions for all their linked children.

delete.description: Students can only delete their own files. Admins can delete any file. Removes from disk and database.

patch.description: Toggles a locker file between private (teacher cannot see) and public (teacher can see). Student must own the file.

get.description: Students see all their own files. Teachers see only public files. Admins see all files.
get.summary: List files in a student's locker

403.description: Forbidden — Cannot view another student's files

post.description: Students can upload files (max 5MB) of allowed types: pdf, jpg, jpeg, png, doc, docx, txt. Each file is stored under the student's locker directory.
post.summary: Upload a file to the digital locker

400.description: File missing, too large, or invalid type

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns an access token (1 hour) and a refresh token (7 days)

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's password. Requires the current password.

get.description: Returns all students linked to the authenticated parent's account. Parent only.

post.description: Creates a new user account. Available roles: Admin, Teacher, Student, Parent

body.example: Please collect report cards by Friday.

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and your JWT token. Example: **Bearer eyJhbGci...**
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
